description: Post-hoc delegation logging plugin — appends one record per worker subagent to a unified JSONL log after each SubagentStop event. Pure observer: no interception, no behavior change, no blocking (FR-LOG-006). Workers run and finish normally; this hook only records what happened. A SessionStart hook surfaces a non-blocking reminder (via additionalContext) if the mandatory WORKER_LOG_PATH is unset or non-absolute (FR-PKG-002); it never blocks the session. The actual fail-loud hard stop lives in record-worker.mjs, before writing a record.
